/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libxela_point_cloud_representation__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libxela_point_cloud_representation__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/xela_point_cloud_representation__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/xela_point_cloud_representation/msg/texel__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xela_point_cloud_representation__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/xela_point_cloud_representation/msg/hand_sensors__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/LeapXELA_Hardware_ws/build/xela_point_cloud_representation:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libxela_point_cloud_representation__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
